requirement.description: The BCM shall transmit the current hazard light status on the CAN bus.

test_cases.title: Verify Hazard_Light_Status = 0 when OFF
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; Hazard switch OFF; Monitor CAN ID 0x100
test_cases.expected_result: Hazard_Light_Status = 0 in all received frames; message transmitted periodically
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_hz_001_hazard_off(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_bcm_messages(can_bus, 1.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= 5, 'Insufficient BCM messages'
    assert all(get_hazard_status(m.data) == 0 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Verify Hazard_Light_Status = 1 when ON
test_cases.expected_result: Hazard_Light_Status = 1 in all frames; no corrupted frames
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_hz_002_hazard_on(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_bcm_messages(can_bus, 1.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= 5, 'Insufficient BCM messages'
    assert all(get_hazard_status(m.data) == 1 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Verify immediate update on state change
test_cases.expected_result: Next BCM_Status_1 reflects status = 1 within one cycle
